marketFinding: Zero pure-black 9 kg top-load full-auto washers on official Egypt manufacturer sites (2026-07-20 Playwright scan). Only official near-black 9 kg tops: Sharp ES-TN09GDSP and Tornado TWE-TLN09RDS (Dark Silver body + Black lid) on Elaraby — both out of stock. Fresh 9 kg top is silver-only OOS. Samsung/LG/Beko/Zanussi 9 kg official SKUs are front-load. True black top-load starts at 10 kg (Fresh Black LED in stock ~13,017 EGP; LG T10V1TEHG2 ~15,990 EGP).

workingRecommendation.strict_9kg_near_black_official: Tornado TWE-TLN09RDS ~12,629 EGP or Sharp ES-TN09GDSP ~13,529 EGP on Elaraby — use Notify me (currently OOS)
workingRecommendation.if_must_buy_now_true_black: Flex to Fresh 10 kg Black LED ~13,017 EGP (official Fresh, in stock) or LG 10 kg Middle Black ~15,990 EGP
workingRecommendation.avoid: Front-load 9 kg blacks if top-load is hard requirement; pure silver 9 kg tops if black aesthetic is hard requirement
workingRecommendation.ui: washer-gallery.html — near-black catalog + flex links in market callout

manufacturers: Elaraby Group (Sharp, Tornado, Hoover, Candy, Hitachi, Toshiba)
